text: Science has a clearer story about RLHF than social media does. RLHF stands for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. It’s how AI learns from our preferences, improving its responses over time. Scientists are using RLHF to enhance algorithms, making them more aligned with human values. But there’s uncertainty too—how do we measure 'human values' accurately? Imagine an AI that understands you better than your best friend! Curious about the future of AI? Hit like and follow for more insights!
